text:
The Rodo [Company] Memorial Plates (, Rodo-sha-sei Kinen Zara) is a series of collectable plates. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 8, Chapter 67 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the Sengi Guild, its agent manages to find three job offers that match Kurapika's request. One of the offers involves an antique collector seeking the plates from 1655 and 1657. 

References
